prompt: Edit the poster in image 1. Replace the text with a new message about creativity, keeping the layered structure. Render the main words in the vibrant brush-stroke font style from image 2. Incorporate the light, whimsical illustrative style of image 3 into the background and decorative elements.
prompt_refined: Edit the chalkboard poster displayed in image 1. Completely replace the existing text with a new message about creativity, ensuring it maintains the original hierarchical, layered structure where a prominent main word is followed by a smaller descriptive phrase. Render these prominent main words using the vibrant, lime-green, brush-stroke font style seen in image 2. Integrate the light, whimsical, flat-design illustration style from image 3 into the poster's background and update the existing corner decorative elements to reflect this illustrative style, such as stylized organic shapes or simple abstract elements.
objects: Existing text from image 1 (should not be present)
Hierarchical text structure (prominent main words followed by smaller descriptive phrases)
Prominent main words in lime-green, brush-stroke font style
Corner decorative elements (stylized organic shapes or simple abstract elements)
